title: Lead Investment Banker at L&T Finance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at L&T Finance
jsonLd.description:
L&T Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About L&T Finance:
L&T Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance!
